arts.ttl: Arsenal fan claimed racial abuse of Thomas Partey was a 'joke' as court hands out three-year ban
arts.sum: An Arsenal supporter has been handed a three-year football banning order for racially abusing midfielder Thomas Partey, despite his defence that he was satirically imitating a white racist. The prosecutor added that Ogunmilade told the police that the post was meant to be a sarcastic quote within a group of friends.

arts.ttl: Arsenal transfer news: Martin Zubimendi 'green light', Alexander Isak plan and Arda Guler deal
arts.sum: The Gunners continue to be heavily linked with numerous players but, with Edu on gardening leave, it remains to be seen whether or not Jason Ayto will lead recruitment in the new year . Mikel Arteta could reignite Arsenal's title hopes by bringing a few new faces to the Emirates Stadium in the January transfer window.

arts.ttl: Man United 'preparing to make £50m bid' to reunite Ruben Amorim with Sporting Lisbon star
arts.sum: Manchester United are reportedly preparing a £50m bid for Sporting Lisbon and Portugal winger Geovany Quenda, who could reunite with Ruben Amorim at Old Trafford.

arts.ttl: Insider says Arsenal doing “anything in their power” to prevent nightmare transfer scenario
arts.sum: Arsenal are being tipped to do all they can to keep William Saliba from sealing a transfer away from the club amid links with Real Madrid. Saliba has widely been reported as being on Real Madrid’s radar in recent times, which is hardly surprising after his superb form at the Emirates Stadium. arts.ttl: Barcelona hatch BIZARRE plan to beat Man Utd to Gyokeres
arts.sum: Barcelona are plotting to sign Viktor Gyokeres and loan him back to Sporting CP for a year, according to Spanish media. Lewandowski has scored a brilliant 20 goals in 18 games this term, which means that there is no pressing need to add another centre-forward, but Barcelona would still like to plan for the future.
